diagrams.title: Thread Scheduling States and Transitions
diagrams.description: Shows thread states and transitions relevant to scheduling: NEW, READY, RUNNING, WAITING, TERMINATED. READY queue is where scheduler picks next thread.
diagrams.purpose: Understand where scheduling decisions occur in thread lifecycle

diagrams.title: Multiple Processor Scheduling Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows SMP architecture with shared ready queue and load balancing mechanisms between processors.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how threads are scheduled across multiple CPUs and role of processor affinity

diagrams.title: Round Robin Time Quantum Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how Round Robin cycles through threads with fixed time quantum, showing preemption and queue rotation.
diagrams.purpose: Understand cyclic execution and preemption in time-sliced scheduling

diagrams.title: Multilevel Queue Scheduling Structure
diagrams.description: Shows division of ready queue into multiple queues with different scheduling algorithms for each queue type.
elements: Scheduler selects from highest non-empty queue
Each queue has own algorithm (RR, FCFS)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize hierarchical queue organization and scheduling decisions
